## Prototype or tool

Which part does this affect?

## Problem

What user or operator problem does this solve?

## Proposed solution

Describe the smallest useful improvement.

## Validation

How should this be tested?

## Done when

- [ ] Demo mode still works
- [ ] Public docs are updated
- [ ] Screenshots or examples are updated if needed
- [ ] No private/local data is exposed
